arts.sum: Juventus manager Thiago Motta has addressed the press ahead of today's heavily anticipated Serie A encounter against crosstown rivals Torino. arts.ttl: ‘I want a brave Torino’: Vanoli Prepares for derby against Juventus
arts.sum: As Torino gears up for the highly anticipated derby against Juventus, head coach Paolo Vanoli addressed the media in a press conference, expressing his excitement and determination for the match. “The group is doing very well; we are having a wonderful week knowing the importance of this game,” he stated. “The main indication? Silence. When preparing for a derby, it’s nice to feel the energy around; I find my own motivations.” Reflecting on his players’ mindset leading up to the match, Vanoli noted, “Absolutely, we have the fortune to live in the present and experience these feelings that come rarely. The post ‘I want a brave Torino’: Vanoli Prepares for derby against Juventus appeared first on FootItalia.com.
